offer: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients/month, manual calculations cause delays in report generation. We automate depreciation schedules instead of manual spreadsheets and calculations.
problem: Manual calculations of fixed asset depreciation lead to errors and inefficiencies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where accounting firms seek advice
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 accounting firms with demo video
Community forums where accounting firms share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for asset details and schedule generation
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing asset data
